title: Gulf, Arab states welcome US-Iran deal to end war, reopen Hormuz

snapshot.title: Gulf, Arab states welcome US-Iran deal to end war, reopen Hormuz
snapshot.description: DUBAI: Gulf and Arab states welcomed on Monday a US-Iran agreement to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, expressing hope that the deal will pave the way for lasting regional stability and broader diplomatic engagement. Saudi Arabia welcomed the agreement between Washington and Tehran to halt military operations and begin detailed negotiations over a 60-day period
snapshot.author: Arab News
snapshot.pageTitle: Gulf, Arab states welcome US-Iran deal to end war, reopen Hormuz | Arab News
